title: Streaming large result set via Repo.stream + transaction
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.stream_all_published/0` that streams all published posts without loading them into memory. Use `Repo.stream/2` (must be inside a `Repo.transaction/2`). Return the transaction wrapping `stream |> Stream.map(&process/1) |> Enum.to_list()`. Pin `true` for the published filter. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Streaming requires knowing `Repo.stream` must run inside a transaction. Niche operational knowledge.
